sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32117" key="e)kka/rphsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκκάρπ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32117.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">growing to seed,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">665</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
